locationNotFound: Ba a samu wurin ba — gwada kalmar bincike dabam.
searchFailed: Binciken ya gaza — duba haɗin ku kuma sake gwadawa.
locationDenied: An hana samun wuri — yi bincike a sama ko kunna wurin don nemo tashoshi kusa da ku.
noStationsFilter: Babu tashoshi da suka dace da zaɓin tacewa.
showingCount: Ana nuna {{visible}} daga cikin {{total}} — gungura don ƙarin
errorTooManyRequests: Buƙatoci da yawa — don Allah jira ɗan lokaci kuma sake gwadawa.
errorServerBusy: Sabar taswira tana aiki — don Allah sake gwadawa nan da nan.
errorTimeout: Binciken ya ƙare — gwada ƙaramin yanki ko sake gwadawa.
errorNetwork: Kuskuren cibiyar sadarwa — duba haɗin ku kuma sake gwadawa.
errorGeneric: An kasa loda tashoshi. Duba haɗin ku.
